Plaintiff'S Ex-Parte Application For A Right To Attach Order And/Or Temporary Protective Order
Off Calendar Jun-13-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
James H. Oddie, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Bradshaw & Associates, P. C.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Bradshaw and Associates P. C.' ex parte application for right to attach order or temporary protective order is denied without prejudice for plaintiff to file and serve a noticed application. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
